review: It is the worse app I have ever downloaded. Slow, frustrating, maddening.
It used to be responsive and intuitive. Now the app is slow as hell and the UX is garbage.

How is it that one of the biggest chains in the world has an app that needs to be uploaded every time I would like to use it. Then each time I do upload it, it takes 5 mins of jumping through hoops to finally work. Then I am reminded again as to why I don't use that app after all it takes to place an order for the odd time I want a delivery.
Horrible update, unable to sign into app since
